## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm test` pass
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes (see AGENTS.md → Definition of Done)
- [ ] A changeset is included if this changes a published package (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
